author: Chris Nkuno
name: 11L + XSA4 H100 Legal Frontier
blurb: Single-H100 non-record submission using an 11-layer decoder-only transformer with XSA in the final 4 layers. The best legal checkpoint was selected from a 25-step frontier and packaged with packed_zstd plus no_default_large_keeps to stay under the 16,000,000-byte cap.
